title: Black And White Cinematic Layered Focus Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Black And White Cinematic Layered Focus Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 4:5 black-and-white cinematic film portrait of adult young woman with wind-tossed dark hair, pale skin, and restrained unresolved expression, built around layered focus and unresolved emotional tension. Subject: adult young woman with wind-tossed dark hair, pale skin, and restrained unresolved expression wears black wool coat over a minimal dark turtleneck; her face center stays relatively readable, especially eyes, nose bridge, lips, and facial center line. Scene: windy seashore with mist, low horizon, and sparse grayscale background creates minimal background, mist, wind, haze, and emotional distance while blurred reflected male figure in rainy glass, present only as an emotional echo remains heavily defocused or silhouette-like rather than a clear second main subject. Composition: Layered focus portrait: woman is the readable center, motion blur appears only on hair ends, coat edges, shoulders, moving outlines, and background streaks; foreground/background softness never covers her expression. Signature Elements: Preserved black and white cinematic layered focus portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Film Texture: black-and-white film scan, visible grain, low-contrast grayscale, soft highlights, and deep detailed shadows. Style: Black-and-white arthouse film photography with old film scan texture, visible grain, imperfect framing, shallow depth of field, wind-dragged hair, slow-shutter motion, and unresolved relationship tension. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Soft cinematic monochrome light with readable facial center, haze around edges, and gentle separation between main subject and blurred emotional figure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
